feedback.correct: Correct. Indentation is part of Python block syntax, and import executes top-level code; keep reusable definitions at module level and put command effects behind an explicit main guard.
feedback.incorrect: That choice preserves the misconception. Indentation is part of Python block syntax, and import executes top-level code; keep reusable definitions at module level and put command effects behind an explicit main guard.
